scope: kolm distillation + serving platform (managed cloud + BYOC self-hosted).

questions.question: Do you maintain a documented risk management program?
questions.evidence: Risk register reviewed quarterly. Aligned with ISO/IEC 27005.

questions.question: Is the risk management program reviewed at least annually by executive leadership?
questions.evidence: Annual review at the Q1 board meeting; approved risk appetite + remediation budget signed by CEO.

questions.question: Do you have a written information security policy?
questions.evidence: Master security policy + 18 subordinate policies (acceptable use, access control, BCP, change mgmt, etc). Reviewed annually.

questions.question: Is the security policy communicated to all employees?
questions.evidence: Mandatory acceptance during onboarding; annual re-attestation tracked in HRIS.

questions.question: Is there a designated information security officer or equivalent role?
questions.evidence: VP of Security reports directly to CEO. Charter at /trust/security-charter.

questions.question: Do you maintain an inventory of information assets?
questions.evidence: CMDB tracks all production assets (servers, services, repos, data stores). Asset owner + classification + retention policy per row.

questions.question: Are employees required to undergo security awareness training?
questions.evidence: KnowBe4 quarterly modules; mandatory completion gated by access reviews. Phishing simulation quarterly.

questions.question: Are background checks performed prior to hiring?
questions.evidence: Checkr (criminal + employment + education) prior to first day. Re-check every 24 months for sustained prod access.

questions.question: Are physical security controls in place at facilities housing customer data?
questions.evidence: Inherited from hosting providers: Vercel (AWS us-east-1) + Railway (GCP us-central1). Both SOC 2 Type II. No Kolm-operated datacenters.

questions.question: Are change management procedures documented and followed?
questions.evidence: All prod changes via git → CI → human review → tagged release. CHANGELOG.md + release notes for every shipped change.

questions.question: Are backups performed and tested?
questions.evidence: Daily encrypted backups to S3-compatible storage; monthly restore drills. Last successful drill 2026-05-01 (logged in /trust/backup-drills).

questions.question: Is access to systems granted based on least privilege?
questions.evidence: RBAC with 4 roles (owner / admin / member / viewer). Default viewer. Quarterly access reviews.

questions.question: Is multi-factor authentication required for privileged access?
questions.evidence: MFA mandatory for all prod-access employees. TOTP + WebAuthn enforced via SSO IdP.

questions.question: Are user accounts disabled within 24 hours of termination?
questions.evidence: Termination triggers automatic SSO disable + secrets rotation playbook (HashiCorp Vault). SLA tracked in HRIS.

questions.question: Is application security testing performed prior to release?
questions.evidence: Static analysis (ESLint security plugins, semgrep) + dependency audit (npm/pip/cargo) + SAST gate in CI. All blocked findings remediated before merge.

questions.question: Are penetration tests performed at least annually?
questions.evidence: Independent third-party pentest annually. Latest report Q2 2026 — summary at /trust/pentest; full report under NDA.

questions.question: Do you have a documented incident response plan?
questions.evidence: Playbooks at docs/runbooks/. PagerDuty rotation, 15min ack SLA. Sev-1 triggers customer comms within 1h.

questions.question: Are customers notified of incidents that may affect their data?
questions.evidence: 72h notification per GDPR Art 33 for confirmed breaches. Statuspage at status.kolm.ai for service incidents. Postmortems at /trust/postmortems.

questions.question: Do you have a documented business continuity plan?
questions.evidence: BCP/DR plan: RTO 4h, RPO 24h for managed cloud. Self-hosted (BYOC) tenants own their own continuity — see docs/self-hosted-deploy-complete.md.

questions.question: Are you compliant with applicable data protection regulations (GDPR / CCPA / equivalent)?
questions.evidence: DPA template at /legal/dpa. Sub-processor list at /legal/subprocessors. DSAR flow at /privacy/request — 30d SLA.

questions.question: Do you hold SOC 2 Type II certification?
questions.evidence: SOC 2 Type II audit in progress (period 2026-01-01 to 2026-12-31). Type I report available now under NDA. ETA full Type II Q1 2027.

questions.question: Do you hold ISO/IEC 27001 certification?
questions.evidence: ISMS designed against ISO/IEC 27001:2022 controls. Formal certification scheduled 2027 H2 once SOC 2 Type II is complete.

questions.question: Do you have a vendor risk management program?
questions.evidence: All sub-processors reviewed annually for SOC 2 + DPA + data residency. Active list at /legal/subprocessors.

questions.question: Is customer data shared with sub-processors only under contractual protection?
questions.evidence: All sub-processors bound by DPA. List versioned + customer-notified of changes per GDPR Art 28(2). 30-day objection window.

questions.question: Is tenant data logically isolated?
questions.evidence: Tenant-scoped event store. Defense-in-depth: per-row tenant_id verification inside every query loop (src/event-store.js findByTenant).

questions.question: Does your service expose a means for customers to verify data integrity?
questions.evidence: Every .kolm artifact ships with cryptographic 4-ring receipt + ed25519 sigstore seal. `kolm verify` replays offline. Receipts available at /v1/verify/:cid.

questions.question: Can customers self-host the service in their own cloud environment?
questions.evidence: Self-hosted BYOC available on Enterprise tier. Helm chart via `kolm serve --helm`. Air-gap bundle via `kolm bundle airgap`. Full deploy guide at docs/self-hosted-deploy-complete.md.

questions.question: Do you provide an AI Bill of Materials (AI BOM) for your models / artifacts?
questions.evidence: Every .kolm artifact emits a CycloneDX 1.5 SBOM via `kolm sbom artifact.kolm`. Includes teacher model lineage, training data hashes, dependencies, license SPDX IDs.

questions.question: Do your AI artifacts comply with the EU AI Act technical documentation requirements (Annex IV)?
questions.evidence: `kolm passport export <artifact> --format compliance` produces EU AI Act Annex IV technical documentation + Hugging Face model card + carbon estimate in a single bundle.

questions.question: Are training data sources documented and auditable?
questions.evidence: spec.toml + eval.frozen.jsonl + bakeoff/ + receipts/data.json bundled inside every .kolm. Frozen eval set hash recorded in manifest; replayable offline via `kolm verify`.

questions.question: Can the artifact be quantified for environmental impact (carbon)?
questions.evidence: Carbon estimate (kg CO2e) recorded in manifest using compute_hours × gpu_class_kw × 0.475 kg/kWh (IEA 2024 grid avg). Surfaced via `kolm passport --format compliance`.

notes: This SIG Lite mapping covers the most-requested questions in enterprise vendor reviews. Full SIG Core (~875 questions) available via `kolm procurement sig --full --out sig.xlsx` or by request to security@kolm.ai.
